pages.title: Fungal Traveller
pages.text: Grow a giant red mushroom and have it connected to your tree in at least three different dimensions.$(br)$(br)You will need the 'Cool Damp Place' challenge to get mushroom descendants of your heart log.

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain a warped fungus. It counts as a descendant of your heart log, and its warped wart blocks count as leaves. Unlike other wood types, warped furniture (but not planks) made from these descendants count as part of your heart tree. (You still cannot absorb other mushrooms into your tree.)
